bead.title: server: add process-backed startup reconcile regression
bead.description:
PROBLEM
After rebuilding/installing DDx at commit b98896c2c and restarting ddx-server.service on 2026-06-16, valid desired worker state for active projects such as /Users/erik/Projects/ddx and /Users/erik/Projects/sesame was not restored until an operator ran `ddx worker set --project ... --count 1 --restart` or `ddx worker reconcile`. This prevents the server from being trusted as the primary worker manager across binary upgrades and service restarts.

ROOT CAUSE WITH FILE:LINE
- cli/internal/server/server.go:360-381 calls reconcileDesiredWorkersAfterStartup from ListenAndServe/ListenAndServeTLS and schedules delayed passes, but the production restart path did not prove that real desired workers are relaunched without a manual POST /api/agent/workers/reconcile.
- cli/internal/server/server_startup_reconcile_test.go:96-204 covers fake controller startup replacement only, leaving no process-backed regression for a restarted server launching a real managed ddx work child.
- cli/cmd/worker.go:118-123 and :169-174 explicitly call POST /api/agent/workers/reconcile after worker set/start, which masked the startup reconcile failure.

PROPOSED FIX
Add process-backed restart coverage around startup reconciliation and fix the startup reconcile path as needed so a restarted server restores desired_count=1 workers for valid active projects before any operator runs `ddx worker reconcile` or POST /api/agent/workers/reconcile.

NON-SCOPE
Do not implement GraphQL worker count/cap changes from ddx-c713d75e. Do not change bead claim semantics or Fizeau routing. Do not remove valid desired worker state for active projects such as /Users/erik/Projects/ddx and /Users/erik/Projects/sesame. Do not solve server.addr stale-pid status fallback except where required to make this child test start and observe the restarted server. Governing artifact reference: plan:server-operator-workbench.

PARENT
- ddx-8674fc2d

DEPENDENCIES
- None supplied by parent bead.
bead.acceptance:
1. New test TestServerServiceRestart_ReconcilesDesiredWorkers starts a real test server or process-backed WorkerManager with desired_count=1 for a valid active project fixture, simulates server restart, and proves a fresh managed ddx work child appears without calling `ddx worker reconcile` or POST /api/agent/workers/reconcile.
2. TestServerServiceRestart_ReconcilesDesiredWorkers fails against the pre-fix behavior where startup fake-controller replacement passes but no real managed ddx work child is relaunched after restart.
3. `cd cli && go test ./internal/server/... ./cmd/...` passes.
4. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes.
